testcase.name: Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-03: empty form shows validation

Authentication — requires login › TC-AUTH-02: wrong password shows error message
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-09: session persists after page reload
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-10: logout clears session and redirects to login
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth\login.spec.js:94:7 › Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-10: logout clears session and redirects to login
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /\/auth\/login/ Received string: "https://app.omre.ai/app/home" Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 22 × unexpected value "https://app.omre.ai/app/home"
at ..\pages\LoginPage.js:67
65 | 66 | async expectOnLoginPage() { > 67 | await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(/\/auth\/login/, { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 68 | } 69 | 70 | async expectErrorVisible() { at LoginPage.expectOnLoginPage (C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\pages\LoginPage.js:67:29) at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\auth\login.spec.js:99:21

testcase.name: Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-11: forgot password link is visible on the login page
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-12: clicking forgot password link opens the password reset form
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-13: password reset form has an email input field
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-14: submitting the reset form with a valid email shows a confirmation or success message
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-15: back to login link is present on the reset password form

Social Login › TC-AUTH-17: Facebook or additional OAuth button is visible on login page
Social Login › TC-AUTH-18: clicking a social login button initiates a redirect or opens a popup
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-19: sign up link or button is visible from the login page
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-20: clicking sign up navigates to or opens a signup form
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-21: signup form has a name field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-22: signup form has an email field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-23: signup form has a password field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-24: signup form shows a password strength indicator when typing
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-25: submitting the signup form creates an account or shows a confirmation
Security › TC-AUTH-26: multiple wrong password attempts show a lockout message or CAPTCHA
Security › TC-AUTH-27: remember me checkbox is present on the login form
Security › TC-AUTH-28: remember me checkbox can be toggled on and off

testcase.name: TC-MEETINGS: Join Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-20: Copy Meeting Link button is present on a card
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-21: clicking a meeting card navigates to detail or opens a panel
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-22: meeting detail shows meeting title
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-23: edit meeting option is present for own meetings
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-24: delete or cancel meeting option is accessible
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-25: delete action shows a confirmation prompt
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-26: past meetings section or history tab is accessible
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-27: switching to past meetings tab updates the list
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-28: switching to upcoming filter restores upcoming list
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-29: empty state renders gracefully when no past meetings exist
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-30: action buttons are keyboard focusable
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-31: meetings page survives a hard reload without JS error
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-32: navigating away and back retains the meetings page structure

error.message: page.goto: Navigation to "https://app.omre.ai/app/meet/home" is interrupted by another navigation to "https://app.omre.ai/app/home"

testcase.error:
[chromium] › features\meetings.spec.js:485:7 › TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-32: navigating away and back retains the meetings page structure
Error: page.goto: Navigation to "https://app.omre.ai/app/meet/home" is interrupted by another navigation to "https://app.omre.ai/app/home" Call log: - navigating to "https://app.omre.ai/app/meet/home", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
13 | 14 | async function goModule(page) { > 15 | await page.goto(MODULE_URL, { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }); | ^ 16 | await page.waitForTimeout(1500); 17 | } 18 | at goModule (C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\features\meetings.spec.js:15:14) at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\features\meetings.spec.js:488:11

[chromium] › platform\orbit.spec.js:42:7 › Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-04: sidebar or navigation is present
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('nav, aside').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 8000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 8000ms - waiting for locator('nav, aside').first()
42 | test('TC-ORBIT-04: sidebar or navigation is present', async ({ page }) => { 43 | const nav = page.locator('nav, aside').first(); > 44 | await expect(nav).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8000 }); | ^ 45 | }); 46 | 47 | test('TC-ORBIT-05: page does not produce uncaught JS errors on load', async ({ page }) => { at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\platform\orbit.spec.js:44:23
